hypothesis: Existing skill is a thin JS wrapper with no Python module, no retry, no caching, no structured output
notes: Reliability=2: no retry/backoff, no timeout, raw fetch throws on network errors. Output=5: returns content+citations but no structured parse, no confidence, no timestamp. RealTime=6: does use grok-4-1-fast-reasoning with live tools, but model name looks wrong (4-1?). Citation=5: citations array returned but no formatting, no dedup, no inline linking. AgentIntegration=3: JS module only, no Python, no CLI for python3, no importable from skills.grok.

hypothesis: Adding exponential backoff with jitter will fix reliability from 2→8 — covers rate limits 429, server errors 5xx, timeouts
change: Added Python grok.py with fixer-style retry/backoff, timeout=60s, max_retries=3
notes: Reliability jumps to 7: handles 429/5xx with backoff+jitter, 60s timeout, classifies retryable vs fatal errors. Other dims unchanged.

hypothesis: Parsing raw content into structured GrokResult dataclass will fix output_usefulness 5→9
change: Added GrokResult dataclass: content, citations (typed), confidence_note, timestamp, cost_estimate, search_type
notes: Output=8: structured dataclass, typed citations with url/title/snippet, timestamp, cost_estimate. Citation=7: formatted with index, dedup by URL. AgentIntegration=5: Python importable now. Real-time unchanged.

hypothesis: Adding explicit live_search=True flag + model validation + freshness metadata will push real-time 6→9
change: Added model validation (grok-3 family), live_search timestamp extraction, search_performed flag in result
notes: RealTime=9: validates model supports live search, extracts server_side_tool_usage to confirm search happened, adds freshness_ts to output. AgentIntegration=6: CLI args exposed.

hypothesis: Formatting citations with inline numbering, dedup, and markdown clickable links will push citation 7→9
change: Added format_citations() with dedup, markdown [N] inline refs, clickable URLs, snippet truncation
notes: Citation=9: numbered markdown refs, clickable [Title](URL), deduplicated by URL, snippet 120 chars. Output improves slightly too.

hypothesis: Full argparse CLI (--mode web|x|image, --domains, --handles, --from, --to, --json) will push agent_integration 6→9
change: Added argparse CLI with all flags, --json output mode, stdin support, exit codes
notes: AgentIntegration=8: python3 grok.py 'query' --mode web|x --json, importable module, proper exit codes. Almost at target.

hypothesis: SQLite caching via agency.db (pyresearch pattern) will push reliability 7→9 and add cost tracking
change: Added ResearchCache integration, TTL 1h for live queries, cost logging to agency.db
notes: Reliability=9: cache-first prevents redundant API calls, rate limit pressure drops. Output=9: cache hit/miss flag in result. Cost logging to agency.db. Average 8.8 — TARGET MET.

hypothesis: Final polish: __init__.py, type hints, docstrings, async wrapper will push agent_integration 8→9
change: Added skills/grok/__init__.py, async_search wrapper, updated SKILL.md with Python examples
notes: AgentIntegration=9: from skills.grok import search_web, async_search, GrokResult. Full Python package. All dims ≥8. Final average 9.0.
